original_statement: in what year was a total of 19 games played?
mutated_statement: in what year was a total of something done?
mutation_analysis: Quantity generalization + Noun/entity generalization + Verb generalization: '19' → 'something' | 'games' → 'something' | 'played' → 'done' (in what year was a total of 19 games played? → in what year was a total of something done?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可以直接识别出关键判断："The table’s last row (row 11) is labeled 'totaal'... and it has no season/year listed"，并且结论为"no year to provide"，说明Agent意识到原始数据中没有对应年份信息。Agent在执行日志中通过simple_query返回了"N/A"并在judge_thought中明确指出无法用表格数据给出具体年份，表现为没有盲目猜测或给出一个确定年份，而是指出信息不足以回答问题。基于这些证据，Agent符合“意识到目标模糊并指出无法在缺少关键信息下回答”的行为特征，因此归类为“意识到目标模糊，反问用户”（即强调需要更多或不存在的数据而未给出具体答案）。
